title: Talent Acquisition Manager (High Volume Hiring!) - Up to $7,500
description:
Lead and develop a high-performing recruitment team to deliver strategic talent acquisition solutions that support business growth and high-volume hiring demands.

Responsibilities

  • Lead and mentor a team of 8 recruiters to enhance their performance and professional development through coaching and performance management
  • Develop and execute talent acquisition strategies aligned with organizational hiring needs to attract and secure top talent
  • Manage end-to-end recruitment operations to ensure efficient and seamless hiring processes across all roles
  • Analyze recruitment performance metrics and generate insightful reports to inform management decision-making and improve hiring outcomes
  • Monitor and apply current recruitment trends and best practices to continuously enhance talent acquisition effectiveness
  • Build and maintain strong partnerships with hiring managers, recruitment agencies, educational institutions, and external stakeholders to support talent sourcing and employer branding
  • Support high-volume recruitment initiatives to meet dynamic business growth requirements

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven leadership experience managing and developing recruitment teams
  • Strong expertise in high-volume hiring processes
  • Minimum 10 years of talent acquisition experience, preferably within the healthcare industry
  • Minimum degree in Human Resources, Business, or a related field

If interested, please email me at alexgoh@recruitexpress.com.sg or telegram @alexgohhl

➖

Alex Goh Hock Leong

(CEI.No: R1763413 l Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Life Science) | 99C4599).

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
